name: Mayonnaise Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
-----------------FLUFFY CHOCOLATE FROSTING-----------------
1 cup packed brown sugar
3 tbsp half and half or light cream
3 tbsp butter or regular margarine
1/3 cup semisweet chocolate chips
1/2 tsp vanilla extract
Sift together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; set aside. Combine mayonnaise and sugar in a mixing bowl. Beat with an electric mixer at medium speed until blended. Gradually beat in cold water and vanilla. Add dry ingredients to the mayonnaise mixture, beating until well blended, about 2 minutes. Pour batter into greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F. oven for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool in pan on a rack. Frost with Fluffy Chocolate Frosting. Cut into squares.
FLUFFY CHOCOLATE FROSTING: Combine brown sugar, light cream, and butter in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil. Boil for 1 minute. Remove from heat. Stir in chocolate chips and vanilla. Beat with an electric mixer at high speed until of a spreading consistency.
